div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 6 — Service and container isolation

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 5 — Data protection and evidence

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 4 — Authorization and tenant isolation

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 3 — Authentication

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 2 — Request filters (Spring Security chain, stateless)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layer 1 — Edge (Traefik v3.6.12)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TLS + HSTS preload,
Let's Encrypt

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
X-Forwarded-For overwrite
(trustedIPs empty) —
no spoofed client IPs

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
security headers,
Permissions-Policy: camera/mic
only on verify.fivucsas.com

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IP-allowlisted admin surfaces
(Swagger, actuator, Grafana)
+ edge rate limit

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
JWT auth — RS256 pinned in prod
(boot fail-fast), kid routing +
revocation list, iss/aud required

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
rate limiting — Bucket4j
IN-PROCESS buckets +
Redis sliding-window filter,
6000/min tenant mint budget

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
anti-replay X-Request-Nonce
(Redis SETNX, 5-min TTL)
on biometric + NFC POSTs

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CORS allowlist +
tenant context bind
from verified JWT

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BCrypt cost 12 +
5-strike lockout: HTTP 423,
15 min, auto-clearing

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
12 login methods, N-step MFA —
tokens minted only after the
LAST step (amr claim, RFC 8176)

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TOTP secrets AES-GCM-256 +
~120 s replay marker — OTP wiped
on the 5th wrong guess

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WebAuthn / passkeys (UV required),
PKCE S256 mandatory for public
clients, refresh rotation + family
revocation on reuse

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
two-tier authority:
platform user_type (ROOT, ...)
over within-tenant RBAC roles

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
48 fine-grained permissions,
@PreAuthorize checks

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hibernate tenantFilter on the
9 tenant-scoped entities —
scoped bypass only for
self ('/my') lookups

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
biometric embeddings:
Fernet ciphertext is the
store-of-record (+ key_version)

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
refresh tokens stored hashed,
TOTP secrets encrypted,
secrets only in env files

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
soft delete + 30-day purge job
(ShedLock, DB-backed) —
hard DELETE forbidden by trigger

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
audit_logs on every auth,
admin and biometric event

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
biometric service: NO public
route — internal Docker network
+ X-API-Key only

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
containers: read-only rootfs,
cap_drop ALL,
no-new-privileges, CPU/RAM caps

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Traefik reads Docker through
docker-socket-proxy —
never the raw socket
